docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY ROBERTSON, PAUL

ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE OEX: BENCH LETTER ISSUED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER TO RECALL ISSUANCE OF WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER TO RECALL ISSUANCE OF WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 1/22/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,400.00 FILED BY ROBERTSON, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ AKA SURAK KUMAR RAJWANI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-01-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF PAUL ROBERTSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2018; JUDGMENT DEBTOR SURAJ RAJWANI FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR PAUL ROBERTSON AND CONFIRMS BENCH WARRANT ISSUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ AKA SURAK KUMAR RAJWANI
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2018 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-05-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERTSON, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ AKA SURAK KUMAR RAJWANI $6,329.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,554.00, $5725.00 (DAMAGES), $24.00 (BANKING FEES), $60.00 (C.C.P. SECTION 1719 NSF CHECK FEES), $560.00 (SPECIAL DAMAGES). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: SEP-14-2018 - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ AKA SURAK KUMAR RAJWANI
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: BENCH LETTER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/05/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RAJWANI, SURAJ AKA SURAK KUMAR RAJWANI HEARING SET FOR OCT-18-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ORDER WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
